narrative:
Springfield Twp township has 1,744 registered voters, with 55.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.2%, a clear Republican lean of 10.2 percentage points.
